sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh sungah kikhen lo hi, Ni suah, ni tum sak, khang;
Leitung khempeh kua mi, kua mi, lawm

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Jesuh sungah lungsiim mante’n, pawl ngah kawikawi ding
Ama nasepna, miteng henkhawm, kham khau zang bang hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: teng, u le nau bang hihang;
Bang nam hi leng, Pa’ nasem teng, beh khat phung khat

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Jesuh sungah, i kimat hi, sakmi, khang mi, paam mi;
